about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: Innovating Social Media Growth
about.whoWeAreDesc: We are a premier social media marketing solution provider, dedicated to helping businesses and individuals amplify their online presence. With years of expertise in digital growth strategies, we deliver authentic engagement and measurable results.
about.missionDesc: To empower brands with cutting-edge tools and strategies for sustainable digital growth, making professional marketing accessible to everyone.
about.visionDesc: To become the global standard for reliability and innovation in social media services, fostering a community where creativity thrives.
about.instantDeliveryDesc: Automated systems ensure your orders are processed immediately.
about.secureSafeDesc: Your privacy and security are our top priority with encrypted transactions.
about.support247Desc: Our dedicated team is always ready to assist you with any queries.
about.premiumQualityDesc: We provide only high-quality services to ensure best results.

mshTechGroup.name: MSH TECH GROUP OF COMPANIES
mshTechGroup.description: MSH Tech Group of Companies is a diversified global technology holding organization established in 2017, operating as the parent company for all MSH-branded businesses. The group delivers integrated IT, digital, telecom, creative, and automation solutions to clients across national and international markets, maintaining unified standards of innovation, quality, and compliance.
mshTechGroup.registration: We are a fully registered and compliant organization, officially registered with SECP, FBR, PSUB, and other relevant legal authorities. With over 7+ years of industry experience, we have successfully served 1M+ users worldwide, ranging from individuals and startups to enterprises and global organizations.

creative.name: Creative & Media
items: Video Editing, Motion Graphics & Short-Form Content

leadership.ceoTitle: CEO - Technology entrepreneur and digital strategist with a strong focus on scalable systems, innovation, and long-term growth.

mshTechGroup.mission: To empower businesses and users globally through secure, scalable, and innovative digital solutions.
mshTechGroup.vision: To become a globally trusted technology group driving digital transformation.

mshDigitalSolutions.name: MSH DIGITAL SOLUTIONS
mshDigitalSolutions.description: MSH Digital Solutions is a full-service digital and creative technology company under MSH Tech Group of Companies, operating since 2017. We help businesses establish strong digital identities, automate workflows, and scale online growth across global markets.
mshDigitalSolutions.registration: Registered with SECP, FBR, and PSUB, we have successfully served 1M+ users worldwide with reliable, compliant, and performance-driven solutions.

mshTelecomNetwork.name: MSH TELECOM NETWORK
mshTelecomNetwork.description: MSH Telecom Network is a specialized telecom and IT infrastructure company under MSH Tech Group of Companies, delivering secure and scalable communication systems since 2017.
mshTelecomNetwork.registration: We are legally registered with SECP, FBR, and PSUB, and currently support 1M+ users worldwide through reliable telecom and network solutions.

leadership.description: Led by CEO Muhammad Salman Hashmi, MSH Telecom Network is managed by a skilled leadership team working under centralized group governance, supported by 750+ technical professionals worldwide.

mshDigitalHub.name: MSH DIGITAL HUB
mshDigitalHub.description: MSH Digital Hub is an innovation-focused digital platform under MSH Tech Group of Companies, serving creators, professionals, and businesses since 2017. We provide accessible tools, education, and creative services to 1M+ users globally.

leadership.description: Operating under CEO Muhammad Salman Hashmi, MSH Digital Hub is supported by the same core management and a global workforce of 750+ professionals, ensuring innovation, scalability, and reliability.

footer.smmAbout: Our SMM Panel delivers reliable, fast social media marketing services—followers, likes, views, and engagement—with 24/7 support and secure payment options. Trusted by thousands worldwide for quality and delivery. We keep your data secure and your orders on track.
footer.privacyText: Your privacy is important to us. We are committed to protecting your personal information and ensuring a secure experience.
footer.locationAddress: Main MSH TECH GROUP OF COMPANIES Head Office, Near Riaz Town, Khan Pur, Punjab, Pakistan.

policies.privacyIntro: MSH SMM Panel is committed to protecting your privacy. This policy explains how we collect, use, and safeguard your information when you use our services.

privacySections.collectionText: We collect information you provide when registering (name, email, payment details), usage data, and device information to improve our services and process orders.
privacySections.useText: Your information is used to process orders, provide customer support, send service updates, improve our platform, and comply with legal obligations.
privacySections.securityText: We use industry-standard encryption and security measures to protect your personal and payment data. We do not store full credit card numbers.
privacySections.cookiesText: We use cookies and similar technologies to maintain sessions, remember preferences, and analyze site traffic. You can manage cookie settings in your browser.
privacySections.thirdPartyText: We may share data with payment processors and service providers necessary to operate our platform. We do not sell your personal information.

policies.refundIntro: Please read this policy carefully. By using MSH SMM Panel you agree to these payment and refund terms.

refundSections.paymentMethodsText: We accept major payment methods as displayed on our website. All transactions are processed through secure payment gateways. You are responsible for any fees charged by your bank or provider.
refundSections.pricingText: Prices are displayed in USD (or as shown). We reserve the right to change prices. Orders are charged at the rate at the time of purchase.
refundSections.refundEligibilityText: Refunds may be considered for undelivered or significantly delayed orders. You must contact support within the timeframe stated for your service. Refunds are not available for completed or partially delivered orders.
refundSections.refundProcessText: To request a refund, contact our support with your order ID and reason. We will review and respond within 5–7 business days. Approved refunds will be credited to your original payment method within 10–14 business days.
refundSections.disputesText: Any payment disputes should be raised with our support team first. Chargebacks without prior contact may result in account suspension.

policies.announcementsIntro: Important updates and notices from MSH SMM Panel.
policies.announcementItem1Text: All services are currently operational. Delivery times may vary during peak hours. We appreciate your patience.
policies.announcementItem2Text: We support secure payments. Please ensure you have read our Payment & Refund Policy and Privacy Policy before placing orders.
policies.announcementItem3Text: For any queries, use our Contact form or UAN Helpline: +92-336-3333-442. We are here to help.
